title: acuston clypeatum
intro: Acuston clypeatum, also known as Lungwort or Pulmonaria officinalis, is a perennial plant that belongs to the borage family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Acuston clypeatum include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and even exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
